summary: GH-91 minimal spec is approved for a package-local input schema PR. The spec correctly limits scope to the Example Domain read input contract, safe examples, invalid input classes, and manifest asset ref status.
reviewed_validation_summary: Local validation passed for `jq empty sites/example/read-public-page/manifest.json sites/example/read-public-page/schemas/input.schema.json .loom/bootstrap/init-result.json .loom/specs/GH-91/build-evidence.json`, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-91 --json`, and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-91 --json` at head `cec6afeb4fe881892d8db3cef69457113eda0f0b`.
follow_ups: Run separate Work Items for GH-92 through GH-98 before treating the package as stable or executable.
